_meta.desc: Ban do cac mode battle/farm cua Onmyoji (PHAN A prompt). Trich tu knowledge/oas_features.json (52 task OAS) + oas_pagegraph.json (topology). nav = duong page OAS; bot ta dung graph_memory de hoc duong THAT tuong ung.

battle_flow_generic.desc: Flow chung moi tran (tu OAS GeneralBattle + farm.py FSM da verify live)
states: PREPARE (man chuan bi, highlight team, bam ready)
battle_flow_generic.notes: SELECT uu tien truoc FIGHTING khi nhan dien ('Skills' man chon de nham 'Skill' man danh - FIGHTING chi tin 'Surrender'). RESULT bat qua Tapto/continue/ClearTime.

exploration.name: Exploration (探索) - farm EXP/coin/scroll + soul boss
exploration.goal: Farm exp cho shikigami fodder + danh boss chapter; mo khoa soul zones
flow: vao chapter -> man co quai thuong + boss
boss xuat hien sau khi het quai -> danh boss
nhan reward, co the xuat hien ruong/scroll
exploration.win: thang moi tran battle; chapter xong khi boss chet
exploration.reward: EXP, coin, awake material, treasure box
exploration.risk: thua neu team yeu; AP can

realm_raid.name: Realm Raid (结界突破) - danh ket gioi nguoi choi khac
realm_raid.goal: Pha 9 o ket gioi de lay medal + reward; uu tien lam DAU TIEN (flow ngan, kiem chung battle FSM)
flow: chon o (uu tien o yeu/da thua) -> Attack
win: o vo, medal tang; lose: o danh dau
het 9 o hoac het ve thi dung
realm_raid.win: thang tran -> pha o; du 9 o co the nhan thuong chuong
realm_raid.risk: thua lien tuc neu xep hang cao; co frog boss (is_frog) ngau nhien

orochi.name: Orochi (八岐大蛇) - soul zone farm chinh
orochi.goal: Farm soul (vong 10/11) - nguon soul chinh cua game
flow: Challenge -> battle (co the to doi: leader/member/alone)
orochi.win: thang tran orochi layer da chon
orochi.cost: ve orochi (mua bang medal/jade hoac nhan daily)
orochi.risk: ton ve; can team du manh cho layer 11

sougenbi.name: Sougenbi (业原火/草原火) - soul zone phu
sougenbi.goal: Farm soul dinh huong (chon loai soul theo category)
sougenbi.risk: it - flow don gian nhat trong soul zones

eternity_sea.name: Eternity Sea (永生之海) - soul zone cao cap
eternity_sea.goal: Farm soul 6* ti le cao hon orochi (can team manh)
eternity_sea.risk: kho hon orochi; chi lam khi team du manh

area_boss.name: Area Boss (地域鬼王) - boss vung daily
area_boss.goal: Danh 3 boss vung moi ngay lay reward (xep hang theo damage)
area_boss.win: boss chet hoac het gio (van co reward theo damage)
area_boss.risk: thap - khong mat gi khi thua

demon_encounter.name: Demon Encounter (逢魔之时) - guild demon daily
demon_encounter.goal: Danh quy guild 1 lan/ngay (19h-21h thuong mo)
demon_encounter.win: 1 tran duy nhat, reward theo damage
demon_encounter.risk: canh OAS ghi 'tro nhan tinh khong mo' - kiem tra gio mo cua

wanted_quests.name: Wanted Quests (悬赏封印) - truy na daily
wanted_quests.goal: Hoan thanh cac don truy na (danh quai chi dinh) lay reward
nav: (bang truy na ben trai man chinh)
flow: moi quest chi noi quai o dau (exploration chapter/soul zone...)
di den noi do danh du so luong
wanted_quests.reward: AP, coin, dau hon, jade (tuy don)
wanted_quests.risk: ton thoi gian dieu huong nhieu noi - lam SAU khi nav graph tot

goryou_realm.name: Goryou Realm (御灵之境) - farm material thuc tinh vu khi
goryou_realm.goal: Farm nguyen lieu goryou (4 loai theo thu)

duel.name: Duel (斗技) - PvP xep hang
duel.goal: Danh PvP lay diem honor + xep hang mua
duel.risk: CAO - PvP that, KHONG auto khi chua chac chan; de sau cung
